name: Native Asset Wrapper (XLM SAC)
description: Stellar Asset Contract wrapping the native XLM asset. Exposes XLM as a SEP-41-compatible Soroban token. Mint, burn, clawback, and authorization operations are not available on the native asset.

functions.name: transfer
functions.doc: Transfer `amount` stroops of XLM from `from` to `to`. Requires authorization from `from`.

functions.name: transfer_from
functions.doc: Transfer `amount` stroops from `from` to `to` using a pre-approved allowance.

params.name: spender
params.doc: Address that was granted the allowance.

params.name: from
params.doc: Source account whose allowance is consumed.

functions.name: approve
functions.doc: Approve `spender` to transfer up to `amount` stroops from the caller's balance.

params.name: expiration_ledger
params.doc: Ledger sequence number at which the allowance expires.

functions.name: allowance
functions.doc: Return the remaining allowance that `spender` may transfer from `from`.

functions.name: balance
functions.doc: Return the XLM balance of `id` in stroops.

params.name: id
params.doc: Account or contract address to query.

functions.name: decimals
functions.doc: Return the number of decimal places. Always 7 for XLM (1 XLM = 10^7 stroops).

functions.name: authorized
functions.doc: Return whether `id` is authorized. Always true for the native asset.

outputs.doc: Always true for the native asset.
